name: P1.3 坐标几何（直线/圆/轨迹）
subject: math
curriculum_points: 1.3 Understand and use the coordinate geometry of the straight line, including the forms y = mx + c and ax + by + c = 0.
1.3 Understand and use the coordinate geometry of the circle, including the forms (x – a)² + (y – b)² = r² and x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0.

1.3 Use the following circle properties in problems:
• the perpendicular from the centre to a chord bisects the chord
• the tangent at any point on a circle is perpendicular to the radius at that point
• the angle in a semicircle is a right angle.
